subtitle: A personalized birthday celebration from Travis
bigline: Five spins created especially for Taylor.

welcome.title: Welcome, Taylor!
paragraphs: This personalized birthday Slots greeting was created especially for you.
You have 5 official spins, and every official spin is a win.
Travis wanted to make your birthday feel a little more memorable.
welcome.overrideLine: The Swifties are reviewing the celebration paperwork.

scoreboard.title: Birthday Scoreboard
scoreboard.note: Every official spin brings another birthday win.

rules: Every official spin is a win.
You have 5 official spins to enjoy.
Any promised cash or gifts are supplied by Travis, not Playable Greetings.
You can share your final result with Travis.

finale.title: 🎉 Official Birthday Result
finale.note: Happy Birthday, Taylor! Your top cash win is $100,000, provided in person by Travis. More than anything, this game was made to celebrate you.

footer: Created for Taylor with love from Travis.

claim.template: Cash prizes are provided in person by Travis, not Playable Greetings.

auditor.name: Swifties
lines: The Swifties are reviewing the celebration paperwork.
The Swifties requested additional birthday documentation.
The Swifties found no valid reason to object.
The Swifties have stamped this celebration APPROVED.

officialSpins.title: Birthday Begins
officialSpins.message: Welcome, Taylor. This birthday celebration was made especially for you, and every spin is a win.
officialSpins.auditorLine: The Swifties are reviewing the celebration paperwork.

officialSpins.title: Happy Little Extra
officialSpins.message: May your birthday include a smile, a surprise, and perhaps a few Friendship Bracelets.

officialSpins.title: Made With Care
officialSpins.message: Your husband Travis chose to create this birthday moment just for you.
officialSpins.auditorLine: The Swifties requested additional birthday documentation.

officialSpins.title: Take This Moment
officialSpins.message: Pause for a second and enjoy knowing someone cared enough to make this celebration happen.

officialSpins.title: 777 Bonus Unlocked
officialSpins.message: Jackpot! Three bonus spins have been unlocked. The birthday celebration continues!
officialSpins.auditorLine: The Swifties found no valid reason to object.

bonusNoCash.title: Extra Surprise
bonusNoCash.message: An unexpected extra birthday win has arrived.

bonusNoCash.title: More To Celebrate
bonusNoCash.message: The celebration keeps growing with another happy surprise.

bonusNoCash.title: Lasting Win
bonusNoCash.message: The lasting prize is knowing this birthday moment was created especially for you.

bonusCash.title: Cash Surprise
bonusCash.message: You won $20,000 from Travis. Perhaps it can add something wonderful to a Friendship Bracelets moment.

bonusCash.title: Bigger Cash Win
bonusCash.message: You won $50,000 from Travis, along with another reason to celebrate this birthday.

bonusCash.title: Grand Cash Prize
bonusCash.message: You won the $100,000 grand prize from Travis. The Swifties have officially approved this enormous birthday finish.
bonusCash.auditorLine: The Swifties have stamped this celebration APPROVED.
